name: securecourse-web
description: SecureCourse public site, admin UI, and Next.js BFF for the SecureCourse MVP

scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm ci && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build
scripts.prisma:generate: cd backend && npm install && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && npm run prisma:deploy && npm run start:prod
